name: PRIMO Football Academy
nameThai: พรีโม่ ฟุตบอล อะคาเดมี่
addressFull: Tungklom-Tan Man, Pattaya, Chon Buri; the current operator page does not publish a street number
hours: The current Facebook page labels the academy Always open, but it does not publish training or pitch-hire hours.
statusEvidence: The operator page gives a current Tungklom-Tan Man address and phone and has visible activity dated 16 October 2025. Its linked website no longer resolves. This supports an operating academy identity at low confidence, not a verified walk-in pitch timetable.

pickupGames.skillLevel: Children's academy; adult pickup access is unverified

leagues.details: The academy held matches and a charity cup at its former Ban Amphur ground; no current Tungklom-Tan Man competition schedule was found.

football.englishEvidence: The current operator page is bilingual and publishes an English email address, but no current first-hand English booking interaction was captured.

comparison.differentiator: A bilingual non-profit children's academy identity; the current ground and visitor access require direct confirmation after relocation.

sources.label: Current operator Facebook identity, Tungklom-Tan Man address, current phone, bilingual description and visible October 2025 activity
